description: Fashionable sandals for men from lotto, fusing the sturdy floater-style sandals with carefree flip flops. Wear this for all casual occasions Upper Fabric upper with thong style straps and ankle straps to lock the foot in place Fabric toe separator for comfort and durability with branding Fabric ankle straps with velcro fastening Fabric connector between the thong straps and ankle straps Padded rubber footbed with stitch detailing and textured grooves for instep comfort Outsole TPU outsole with multidirectional lugs on the forefoot and heel region for grip and traction Herringbone pattern terracing on the midfoot region Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
